x-enumeration-literals.name: Rewards Checking Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides cash back on debit card purchases or higher interest rates if specific criteria are met, such as a minimum number of transactions or direct deposits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: High-Yield Savings Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Offer significantly higher interest rates (Annual Percentage Yield) than standard accounts to encourage saving, sometimes featuring bonus rates for consistent, monthly deposits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback/Rewards Credit Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reward users with cash back, points, or travel miles on everyday spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sign-up Bonus Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: New checking or savings accounts that offer cash bonuses for opening an account and meeting requirements, such as a minimum direct deposit amount within a set timeframe.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Existing customers receive cash incentives for referring friends or family who open a new account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered/Premium Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provide enhanced benefits-such as waived ATM fees, free checks, or, in some cases, lower interest rates on loans-for holding high balances or having a long-term relationship with the bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Specialty/Targeted Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Include student accounts with specific perks (like discounts) or youth savings accounts designed to reward regular saving habits.
